title: Sofa Upholstery & Furniture Repairman
description:
Sofa Upholstery & Furniture Repairman

(Monthly Basic + Incentive)

Job Offers & Benefits:

· $3500-$4500 gross salary

· Team/Personal Incentive

· Variable performance bonus

· Incremental annual leave yearly (12 to 18 days)

· Staff credit for free product and discount on product purchase yearly.

We are looking for a team player to join our growing Singapore Furniture Brand. We are keen to learn and improve from your contribution to our mutual success.

Candidate Role:

Sofa Upholstery, recliner mechanism and general furniture repair.

Job Responsibility:

· Onsite and in-house repair of sofa and general furniture.

· Assembly and replacement of furniture and sofa parts.

· Inspection, photograph and video product issues and defects.

· Cleaning and servicing of carpentry residues and stone polishing.

· Leather and fabric creasing servicing, cushion and cover upholstery.

· Delivery and Assembly of furniture.

· Repair and Maintenance of furniture.

· 沙发和一般家具的现场和内部维修。

· 家具和沙发部件的组装和更换。

· 检查、拍摄和录像产品问题和缺陷。

· 木工残留物和石材抛光的清洁和维修。

· 皮革和织物压痕维修、坐垫和座套装饰。

· 家具的交付和组装。

· 家具的维修和保养。

Job Requirements:

v 2 years’ experience in sofa and recliner assembly and upholstery.

v Experience in furniture installation and restoration.

v Experience in furniture carpentry & mechanical/electrical replacement.

v Class 3 driving license to drive a van will be a plus.

v Ability to operate power and hand tools, hydraulic jack & forklift or stacker.

v General good health to handle physical activity of carrying heavy items.

v Self-motivated to learn about our products parts, independent and a fast learner

v 5-day work week shift (Mon-Fri & Tue-Sat), 8 hours work daily.

v Able to start with short notice period.

How to Apply:
Submit your application with your updated Resume in Word/PPT/PDF Format.

Email to info@comfy.sg

postedCompany.description: Comfy is committed to working directly with world-class sofa manufacturers from around the globe. We have partnered with factories that have combined the very best of designer styles, high tech functionality, and honest pricing. In our effort to bring you the best options in style, comfort, and utility, we have essentially removed the need for furniture retailers. Keeping cost low, and streamlining your process has always been a top priority at Comfy. Therefore, all of our products are perfectly optimized to contain the best possible pricing, and the highest quality options available on the furniture market.
postedCompany.name: COMFY PTE. LTD.
